BaseTemplate.description: Starter code for your Nextjs Boilerplate with Tailwind CSS

Index.meta_description: Next js Boilerplate is the perfect starter code for your project. Build your React application with the Next.js framework.

About.about_paragraph: Welcome to our About page! We are a team of passionate individuals dedicated to creating amazing software.

Portfolio.presentation: Welcome to my portfolio page! Here you will find a carefully curated collection of my work and accomplishments. Through this portfolio, I'm to showcase my expertise, creativity, and the value I can bring to your projects.

PortfolioSlug.content: Created a set of promotional materials and branding elements for a corporate event. Crafted a visually unified theme, encompassing a logo, posters, banners, and digital assets. Integrated the client's brand identity while infusing it with a contemporary and innovative approach.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

Dashboard.alternative_message: Need advanced features? Multi-tenancy & Teams, Roles & Permissions, Shadcn UI, End-to-End Typesafety with oRPC, Stripe Payment, Light / Dark mode. Try <url></url>.
Dashboard.max_message: Or, need a Self-hosted auth stack (Better Auth)? Try <url></url>.

SiteHeader.solutions_api_desc: Integrate AI image processing into your product
SiteHeader.solutions_video_desc: Upscale AI video to 4K with clarity that survives export
SiteHeader.solutions_bg_remover_desc: Remove any background cleanly in seconds

HomePage.meta_title: Nedriva — Enhance, enlarge, and fix any image with AI
HomePage.meta_description: AI-powered image upscaling, enhancement, and restoration. Increase resolution up to 16×, remove noise, sharpen details, and restore old photos in seconds.
HomePage.headline: Enhance, enlarge, and fix any image
HomePage.subtext: Upscale resolution up to <bold>16×</bold>, remove noise, sharpen details, restore old photos, and remove backgrounds — all in seconds, no design skills needed.
HomePage.showcase_subtext: From catalog shots to portraits and restoration — one workflow for clarity that holds up on any display.
HomePage.showcase_feature_kicker: Built for creators who care about finish
HomePage.showcase_feature_title: Cinematic clarity you can feel in every export

Enhancer.upload_hint: JPG, PNG, WebP up to 50 MB
Enhancer.no_images_yet: You don't have any processed images yet
Enhancer.paid_tooltip_text: Oops! This feature is available only for paid customers.
Enhancer.enhance_button: Enhance  ·  {credits, plural, one {# credit} other {# credits}}
Enhancer.tooltip_upscale: Increase image resolution while enhancing quality. Choose from different enhancement styles below.
Enhancer.tooltip_size: Selects how much to enlarge the image. 1x keeps the original size. For images smaller than 512×512, 4x is recommended.
Enhancer.tooltip_light_ai: Balance out the colors and fix lightning in your images
Enhancer.tooltip_remove_bg: Automatically remove the background from your image
Enhancer.tooltip_bg_general: Works on any subject — people, products, animals, and more
Enhancer.tooltip_clip_to_object: When turned on, the input and output images can be up to 16 MP
Enhancer.output_differs_hint: Matches your downloaded file. Preview above may differ from full-res target when CPU limits apply.
Enhancer.modal_no_result: Open this preview after processing finishes.
Enhancer.toast_upload_pipeline_full_title: Too many images waiting or processing
Enhancer.toast_upload_pipeline_full_description: You can only have up to {max} images that are ready or still processing. Remove one from the queue or wait for a job to finish.
Enhancer.toast_upload_pipeline_partial_descriptio: Added {added} of {attempted} — limit is {max} ready or processing at once.
Enhancer.toast_upload_invalid_type_description: Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or TIFF only.
Enhancer.toast_upload_file_too_large_description: Each image must be {maxMb} MB or smaller.
Enhancer.toast_upload_queue_full_description: Remove some images from the queue first (max {max} local items).
Enhancer.toast_upload_queue_partial_description: Added {added} of {attempted} — queue limit is {max} images.
Enhancer.toast_upload_corrupt_image_description: “{name}” may be damaged or not a valid image.
Enhancer.toast_insufficient_credits_description: This needs {needed} credits but your balance is {balance}. Add credits or run fewer images.
Enhancer.toast_credits_fetch_failed_description: Check your connection and try again.

VideoEnhance.title: Video enhance
VideoEnhance.subtitle: Upscale and export with your preferred resolution and format.
VideoEnhance.drop_hint: Drop a video or click to browse — MP4, WebM, MOV
VideoEnhance.size_4k_locked: 4K output is available on paid plans.
VideoEnhance.format_auto_tip: We pick the best container based on your source and browser support.
VideoEnhance.format_mp4_tip: Widely compatible — best for sharing and social platforms.
VideoEnhance.format_webm_tip: Smaller files with good quality; great for web playback.
VideoEnhance.format_mov_tip: Apple-friendly; ideal for editing in Final Cut or QuickTime.
VideoEnhance.cta_note: Processing will run when the pipeline is connected. Settings are saved with your session.
VideoEnhance.size_tooltip: Choose output resolution. Auto detects the best output for your input. HD = 1280×720, FHD = 1920×1080, 2K ≈ 2560×1440.
VideoEnhance.format_tooltip: Choose the video container format. MP4 is most compatible; WebM is smaller; MOV is best for Apple editing software.
VideoEnhance.denoise_desc: Remove compression noise and grain from the video.
VideoEnhance.deblur_desc: Restore detail lost to motion blur or soft focus.
VideoEnhance.face_desc: Restore and enhance faces using a dedicated face model.
VideoEnhance.style_tooltip: Cinematic adds teal-orange colour grading. Social boosts saturation. Natural keeps colours neutral.

InvitePage.meta_description: Share your link. When someone signs up, you both earn enhancer credits.
InvitePage.title: Invite friends, earn credits
InvitePage.subtitle: Invite more, earn more credits
InvitePage.body_intro: Share your personal link anywhere — social, email, or chat.
InvitePage.both_earn_short: When they sign up, you both get free credits.
InvitePage.tier_sub_detail: of their plan’s monthly price (USD) — one-time cash bonus for you
InvitePage.stat_friends_joined: {count, plural, one {# friend joined} other {# friends joined}}
InvitePage.stat_clicks_caption: Opens of your sign-up link (one per browser tab session).
InvitePage.stat_subs_suffix: Friends who subscribed and triggered your bonus.
InvitePage.stat_friends_zero: No invites yet — share your link to get started.
InvitePage.share_hint: Copy and share this link on social, email, or chat.
InvitePage.modal_empty_credit: No sign-up credits yet — when a friend joins via your link, they’ll show up here.
InvitePage.modal_empty_paid: No subscription bonuses yet — when a referred friend subscribes, your one-time USD bonus appears here.
InvitePage.modal_paid_note: Paid bonuses are real US dollars: each row shows what your friend actually paid (invoice total), the bonus %, and your one-time USD amount (total × %). Sign-up rewards on the other tab are still enhancer credits.

SiteFooter.tagline: AI image enhancement that doesn't look AI.

AffiliateProgram.meta_title: Earn cash from referrals — Nedriva Affiliate Program
AffiliateProgram.meta_description: Share Nedriva with your link. Earn a USD cash bonus when your friend subscribes, plus credits when they sign up.
AffiliateProgram.hero_subtitle: Share your link — friends get free credits on sign-up, and you get {bonus_pct}% of their subscription price in USD when they pay. Example: a friend on a ${example_monthly_usd}/month plan = USD {example_cash_usd} cash for you. Sign-up credits: up to {business} each (work email) or {consumer} each (personal inbox).
AffiliateProgram.demo_caption: What your friends can run with Nedriva Enhancer
AffiliateProgram.earn_subtitle: Every friend can unlock two rewards — credits at sign-up, cash when they pay.
AffiliateProgram.earn_signup_title: Instant credits for both of you
AffiliateProgram.earn_signup_intro: Both you and your friend get free enhancer credits the moment they complete sign-up through your link.
AffiliateProgram.earn_signup_step1_desc: They should click your link before creating an account. Referral is stored for up to {days} days via cookie.
AffiliateProgram.earn_signup_step3_desc: Both balances update right away. Credits are usable immediately on any tool in Boost.
AffiliateProgram.earn_signup_step2_desc: The referral cookie lets us link the new account to you automatically.
AffiliateProgram.earn_sub_intro: When your friend pays any subscription invoice, you receive a one-time USD bonus.
AffiliateProgram.earn_sub_example_note: One bonus per qualifying paid subscription. No cap — it scales with every friend.
AffiliateProgram.earn_sub_step1_desc: Any paid plan qualifies. No minimum plan tier required.
AffiliateProgram.earn_sub_step2_desc: We calculate {bonus_pct}% of their invoice total and send it as a one-time USD bonus.
AffiliateProgram.earn_sub_step3_desc: USD, not app credits. Withdraw or spend it however you like.
AffiliateProgram.f1_desc: When your friend pays for a subscription, you receive a one-time USD bonus equal to {bonus_pct}% of their invoice total. No caps, no limits per referral.
AffiliateProgram.f2_desc: Both you and your friend also get free enhancer credits instantly when they complete sign-up via your link.
AffiliateProgram.f3_desc: Your subscription bonus is paid in real US dollars—not app credits. Withdraw or spend it however you like.
AffiliateProgram.f4_desc: Copy from your invite page. No coupon codes to manage.
AffiliateProgram.f5_desc: See how many friends subscribed and how much USD you've earned from the dashboard.
AffiliateProgram.f6_desc: Sign-up credits add on top of any subscription or pack you already have.
AffiliateProgram.partner_body: Sign in, open your invite page, and share anywhere—social, email, or chat. Your friend should use your link before creating their account.
AffiliateProgram.partner_demo_caption: Sharper detail, cleaner results—what you'll promote
AffiliateProgram.how_subtitle: From link to cash in four steps.
AffiliateProgram.how_step1_desc: Create a Nedriva account or sign in with your existing login.
AffiliateProgram.how_step2_desc: Go to Boost → Invite friends, or open path {invite_path} in the app.
AffiliateProgram.how_step3_desc: Copy the URL with ?ref=. Your friend should tap it before signing up so we can store the referral for up to {days} days.
AffiliateProgram.how_step4_title: You earn cash when they pay
AffiliateProgram.how_step4_desc: When your friend pays a subscription invoice, you receive {bonus_pct}% of the invoice total in USD. Credits land for both of you at sign-up too.
AffiliateProgram.detail_subtitle: Two ways to earn: credits at sign-up + a USD cash bonus when your friend pays.
AffiliateProgram.detail_rewards_body:
Sign-up: both get free enhancer credits ({business} each for work email, {consumer} each for personal inbox).
Subscription: you receive a one-time USD cash bonus equal to {bonus_pct}% of your friend's invoice total.
AffiliateProgram.detail_tracking_body: We use a first-party cookie (name: {cookie}) for up to {days} days so the referral still counts if your friend signs up shortly after clicking.
AffiliateProgram.detail_rules_body: No self-referral. One subscription bonus per eligible new user. USD earnings are yours to keep; abuse may result in reversal per Terms.
AffiliateProgram.detail_cookie_body: Referral stored for {days} days via cookie '{cookie}'. Friend must click your link before signing up.
AffiliateProgram.copy_block_subtitle: Plain text you can paste into email, Notion, or partner briefs. Numbers match the live product configuration.
AffiliateProgram.copy_full:
PIXELAI — Affiliate program (plain-text summary)

EARNINGS
• Sign-up: referrer and new user both receive free enhancer credits.
  – Work / business-style email domain: up to {business} credits each.
  – Personal inbox (e.g. Gmail, Yahoo, Outlook, iCloud): typically {consumer} credits each.
• Subscription: referrer receives a one-time USD cash bonus equal to {bonus_pct}% of the friend's invoice total. No cap per referral.

EXAMPLE
Friend on a ${example_monthly_usd}/month plan → you earn {bonus_pct}% × ${example_monthly_usd} = USD {example_cash_usd} in real cash.

HOW IT WORKS
1. Sign in and open the Invite page at path: {invite_path}
2. Copy your personal link. Example format:
   {example_url}
3. Friend opens your link before creating an account. Referral is stored up to {days} days (browser cookie name: {cookie}).
4. Sign-up: both get credits. When friend pays a subscription invoice: you receive the USD bonus.

PAGES
• Program overview: {affiliate_path}
• Site: {site_url}

FAIR USE
• Self-referrals are not allowed.
• Subject to Terms of Service; we may adjust earnings if abuse is detected.
AffiliateProgram.faq1_a: Two ways: (1) Credits on sign-up — amounts shown on your invite page based on email tier. (2) USD bonus on subscription — {bonus_pct}% of what your friend pays. Example: a ${example_monthly_usd}/month plan = USD {example_cash_usd} cash for you, one time.
AffiliateProgram.faq2_q: Is the USD bonus real money?
AffiliateProgram.faq2_a: Yes. The subscription bonus is paid in USD, not app credits. It is a one-time payment per paid subscription per friend.
AffiliateProgram.faq3_q: How does my friend use my link?
AffiliateProgram.faq3_a: They should open your link before signing up. We store the referral in a cookie and apply rewards once their account exists.
AffiliateProgram.faq4_q: Is there a limit to how many people I can invite?
AffiliateProgram.faq4_a: You can share as widely as you like. Each qualifying new signup and paid subscription counts separately.
AffiliateProgram.faq5_q: Where do I find my link?
AffiliateProgram.faq5_a: After you sign in, go to Boost → Invite friends (or open /boost/invite). Copy and share your URL.
AffiliateProgram.bottom_subtitle: Create a free account and grab your personal invite link in seconds.

VideoEnhancer.meta_description: Upscale AI-generated and screen-captured video to sharp 4K. Recover detail, reduce softness, and export formats ready for YouTube, shorts, and professional edits.
VideoEnhancer.hero_subtext: Turn soft AI renders and compressed clips into publish-ready 4K. Our model rebuilds edges and texture so resolution isn’t just bigger pixels—it’s new detail you can see on any display.
VideoEnhancer.demo_desc: See a full run from upload to export—same pipeline you get in the app.
VideoEnhancer.demo_caption: Representative workflow. Replace the embed ID in code to show your own demo.
VideoEnhancer.demo_video_placeholder: Embed your YouTube demo by setting VIDEO_ENHANCER_DEMO_YOUTUBE_ID.
VideoEnhancer.features_subtitle: Three pillars that matter when AI footage has to look real—not just larger.
VideoEnhancer.feature_1_title: Make AI video sharp enough to publish
VideoEnhancer.feature_1_desc: Sharpen motion without ringing halos. Outputs hold up on large monitors and color-graded timelines.
VideoEnhancer.feature_2_title: New detail, not just bigger pixels
VideoEnhancer.feature_2_desc: We reconstruct structure instead of stretching frames—so text, hair, and fine lines stay legible after upscale.
VideoEnhancer.feature_3_title: Fix softness AI video is known for
VideoEnhancer.feature_3_desc: Reduce the mushy look common in diffusion outputs and heavy compression—ready for YouTube, Reels, and client delivery.
VideoEnhancer.how_subtitle: Upload, pick your target resolution, then preview and download—no plugins required.
VideoEnhancer.how_step1_desc: Drop a clip or pick a file from your device. We support common web and editing formats.
VideoEnhancer.how_step2_desc: Choose output size and format. Start with Auto or lock to Full HD, 2K, or 4K.
VideoEnhancer.how_step3_desc: Review the enhanced preview, then export your final file when it looks right.
VideoEnhancer.usecases_subtitle: From social to post—one upscale that survives compression and grading.
VideoEnhancer.usecase_1_desc: Keep titles and motion crisp after platform transcoding—great for talking heads and AI B-roll.
VideoEnhancer.usecase_2_title: Editors mixing AI with camera footage
VideoEnhancer.usecase_2_desc: Match AI plates to pro footage by recovering detail and reducing mush before conforming to your timeline.
VideoEnhancer.usecase_3_desc: Start from a stronger master so re-uploads to TikTok, Reels, and Shorts still look clean.
VideoEnhancer.more_tools_subtitle: Same Nedriva quality across the rest of your pipeline.
VideoEnhancer.more_tool_1_desc: Push photos and frames to higher resolution with edge-aware detail.
VideoEnhancer.more_tool_2_desc: Cut subjects cleanly for composites and thumbnails.
VideoEnhancer.more_tool_3_desc: Denoise, sharpen, and restore stills before they hit your edit.
VideoEnhancer.faq_subtitle: Quick answers before you run your first clip.
VideoEnhancer.faq_1_a: It increases the resolution of each frame using AI—so your video can display at 2K or 4K with clearer edges and less mush than a simple resize.
VideoEnhancer.faq_2_a: You can explore plans on the pricing page. Credits and trials may change—check checkout for current offers.
VideoEnhancer.faq_3_a: Common formats used in browsers and editors work in the app. Export is tuned for MP4 (H.264) for broad compatibility—see in-app help for the latest list.
VideoEnhancer.faq_4_q: Will this fix every AI artifact?
VideoEnhancer.faq_4_a: It targets softness and lost detail from scaling, not every generative glitch. Severe warping or bad source frames may still need re-generation or manual fixes.
VideoEnhancer.faq_5_a: Time depends on length, resolution, and server load. Short clips usually finish quickly; longer 4K jobs take more time—your queue shows live status.

TestimonialsPage.headline: Loved by creators
TestimonialsPage.subtext: From Etsy sellers to wedding photographers — here's what real users say after their first image.
TestimonialsPage.cta_free: Start for free — no credit card

ToolsPage.headline: Do more with our
ToolsPage.subtext: Every tool is powered by the same model that makes Nedriva results look real — not processed.
ToolsPage.denoiser_desc: Remove grain and noise from photos shot in low light or high ISO.
ToolsPage.upscaler_desc: Increase image resolution up to 16× without losing detail or sharpness.
ToolsPage.sharpener_desc: Fix blur, soft focus, and pixelation. Recover detail from any shot.
ToolsPage.bg_remover_desc: Instantly remove image backgrounds with clean, accurate edge detection.
ToolsPage.restorer_desc: Repair, colorize, and bring vintage or damaged photos back to life.
ToolsPage.face_desc: Improve facial detail in portraits — skin, eyes, and hair, all naturally.

HowItWorksPage.headline: Three steps to a
HowItWorksPage.subtext: No software to install. No design skills needed. Go from upload to download in under 30 seconds.
HowItWorksPage.step1_desc: Drag & drop or click to upload. Supports JPG, PNG, WebP and TIFF up to 50 MB.
HowItWorksPage.step1_hint_sub: JPG, PNG, WebP, TIFF — up to 50 MB
HowItWorksPage.step2_desc: Pick from Upscale, Enhance, Denoise, Restore, Face Enhancement or Remove Background. Preview cost in credits before running.
HowItWorksPage.step3_desc: Your enhanced image is ready in seconds. Download in full resolution — no watermarks, no compression.

ValuePropPage.headline: AI enhancement that
ValuePropPage.subtext: Most AI upscalers boost resolution while destroying what makes your photo unique — adding blur, artifacts, and plastic skin. Nedriva is built differently.
ValuePropPage.card1_desc: Our model reconstructs true image structure — real edges, real texture — rather than interpolating pixels. You get more resolution, zero compression noise.
ValuePropPage.card2_desc: No plastic skin. No fake-looking over-sharpening. No halos around edges. Your result passes as the original high-res shot — because it looks like one.
ValuePropPage.card3_desc: Hair strands, fabric weave, fine text, micro-details — all enhanced with edge-aware AI that never blurs or smears fine structures.

UseCasePage.heading: Built for every type of image work
UseCasePage.subtext: Whether you're a photographer, seller, or archivist — Nedriva handles every scenario with one click.
UseCasePage.no_use_case_desc: Nedriva works on any type of image. Try it free — no account needed.
UseCasePage.ecommerce_desc: Turn low-res product shots into crisp, marketplace-ready images. Remove backgrounds instantly for every SKU.
UseCasePage.portrait_desc: Recover facial details from soft-focus or high-ISO shots. Enhance skin, eyes, and hair without the plastic look.
UseCasePage.restore_desc: Bring faded, torn, or water-damaged family photos back to life. Fix color loss, scratches, and scan artifacts.
UseCasePage.realestate_desc: Make property photos stand out on listing sites. Enhanced clarity and true-to-life colors attract more buyers.

CreditsPage.billing_hero_organization: For teams — checkout is tied to your Clerk organization (create or select an org when prompted).

CreditsPage.hero_sub_business: Higher credit pools, team-friendly limits, and an API tier for product workflows.
CreditsPage.hero_sub_payg: Unlock all paid features with a single purchase. Package credits never expire.
CreditsPage.credits_tooltip: Credits are spent when you run enhancement jobs. Cost depends on options (upscale, Light AI, remove background, etc.).

CreditsPage.how_body: Each enhancement job uses credits based on the options you choose (for example upscale + remove background). Subscription plans refresh credits each billing cycle; pay-as-you-go packs keep their balance until you use them. If you cancel a subscription, unused subscription credits may be forfeited per plan terms — check your plan details at checkout.
CreditsPage.faq_c1_q: How does the credit system work?
CreditsPage.faq_c1_a: Credits are consumed per job. More intensive pipelines (higher resolution, multiple features) use more credits. Your balance updates immediately after each successful run.
CreditsPage.faq_c2_a: Pay-as-you-go credits typically do not expire. Subscription credits refresh each cycle; rollover rules depend on your plan.
CreditsPage.faq_c3_q: What happens if a job fails?
CreditsPage.faq_c3_a: Failed jobs should not charge credits. If you see an unexpected charge, contact support with the job id.
CreditsPage.faq_r1_a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade when your billing cycle allows. Any proration follows the terms shown at checkout.
CreditsPage.faq_r2_a: You can cancel renewal anytime. Access continues until the end of the paid period unless stated otherwise.
CreditsPage.faq_r3_q: Do you offer invoices for businesses?
CreditsPage.faq_r3_a: Business and API tiers can include invoicing. Use “Request access” on the API card or contact sales.

BgRemover.meta_title: AI Background Remover — Clean cutouts in seconds | Nedriva
BgRemover.meta_description: Remove image backgrounds instantly with edge-aware AI. Clean edges on hair, transparency, and complex shapes. No Photoshop needed.
BgRemover.hero_headline: Remove any background in one click
BgRemover.hero_subtext: Upload any image and our AI cuts out the subject instantly — clean edges on hair, semi-transparent elements, and complex shapes. No selection tools, no masks, no Photoshop.
BgRemover.edge_subtitle: What it does well and where it needs a hand.
BgRemover.how_subtitle: Three steps. No account required to try.
BgRemover.how_step1_desc: Drop any JPG, PNG, or WebP. We detect subjects automatically.
BgRemover.how_step2_desc: One click triggers edge-aware background removal. No tools or manual selection needed.
BgRemover.how_step3_desc: Get a clean PNG with transparent background, ready for any design or composite.
BgRemover.compare_subtitle: Built differently from generic background removers.
BgRemover.compare_feat_5: Additional AI tools in one place
BgRemover.more_tools_subtitle: The same quality across your full image pipeline.
BgRemover.more_tool_1_desc: Push resolution up to 16x with real detail reconstruction.
BgRemover.more_tool_2_desc: Upscale AI video to 4K with edge-aware reconstruction.
BgRemover.faq_subtitle: Quick answers before you run your first image.
BgRemover.faq_1_a: JPG, PNG, and WebP are fully supported. TIFF and HEIC can be used in some cases. Output is always PNG with a transparent background.
BgRemover.faq_2_a: You can try it without an account. Full resolution downloads and batch processing require credits — see the pricing page for plans.
BgRemover.faq_3_q: How does it handle hair and fur?
BgRemover.faq_3_a: Our model is specifically trained on fine-detail edge cases including hair, fur, and wispy strands. It outperforms simple threshold-based removers significantly.
BgRemover.faq_4_q: Can I remove backgrounds from multiple images at once?
BgRemover.faq_4_a: Batch processing is available on higher-tier plans. Check your plan details or the pricing page for batch limits.
BgRemover.faq_5_q: What is the maximum image size?
BgRemover.faq_5_a: Upload images up to 50 MB or 64 MP depending on your plan. Larger files are automatically compressed before processing.
BgRemover.examples_subtitle: Portraits, products, cars, architecture — every subject type handled cleanly.
BgRemover.edge_right_desc_1: Subjects on very complex backgrounds, heavy motion blur, or images with compression artifacts may need a second pass or minor manual touch-up. For best results, start with a clean, well-lit source.
BgRemover.edge_right_desc_2: Our model is specifically trained on fine-detail edge cases — but no AI is perfect. If the first result needs help, a second pass or targeted refinement usually gets you there.
BgRemover.edge_tip_1: Use a clean, well-lit source image
BgRemover.edge_tip_3: Try a second pass for complex subjects
